rationale: Educ. Code §31.0214 governs commissioner adjustments to instructional materials and technology allotments for high enrollment growth districts. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised value, or property tax revenue, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change does not conflict with this statute.
quote: Each year the commissioner shall adjust the instructional materials and technology allotment of school districts experiencing high enrollment growth.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. The statute addresses instructional materials allotment adjustments, not property tax or homestead exemption mechanics.
